mapper.sql: device_id, device_name, category, model, purchase_date, laboratory_id, image_url, status, required_permission, manager_id, created_at, price
mapper.insert: insert into device (device_id, device_name, category, model, purchase_date, laboratory_id, image_url, status, required_permission, manager_id, created_at, price, spec, description) values (#{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{device_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchase_date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{required_permission,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{spec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into device
device_id,
device_name,
category,
model,
purchase_date,
laboratory_id,
image_url,
status,
required_permission,
manager_id,
created_at,
price,
spec,
description,
#{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{device_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{purchase_date,jdbcType=DATE},
#{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{required_permission,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{spec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update device
device_name = #{device_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
category = #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model = #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_date = #{purchase_date,jdbcType=DATE},
laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
image_url = #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
required_permission = #{required_permission,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
spec = #{spec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update device set device_name = #{device_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category = #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model = #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchase_date = #{purchase_date,jdbcType=DATE}, laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, image_url = #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, required_permission = #{required_permission,jdbcType=INTEGER}, manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, spec = #{spec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update device set device_name = #{device_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category = #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model = #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchase_date = #{purchase_date,jdbcType=DATE}, laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, image_url = #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, required_permission = #{required_permission,jdbcType=INTEGER}, manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
,
from device where manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '可能发生故障'

select
,
from device where status in ('空闲','等待借出') and #{required_permission,jdbcType=INTEGER} >= required_permission

select
,
from device where status = '故障'
